title: eupatorium horminoides var. leucocephalum
intro: Eupatorium horminoides var. leucocephalum, also known as White Snakeroot or Eupatorium leucocephalum, is a flowering plant in the sunflower family (Asteraceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties, as well as its ability to lower fever and alleviate headaches. The health benefits of White Snakeroot include its use as a digestive aid, a treatment for fever and rheumatism, and its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Herbal preparations of White Snakeroot include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used internally or externally to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
